description: Community-specific hazard exposure modifiers for wind, rain, and tide sub-scores
applied_as: community_wind = storm_wind * wind_exposure_modifier; community_rain = storm_rain * rain_exposure_modifier; community_tide = storm_tide * tide_exposure_modifier; community_hazard = mean(community_wind, community_rain, community_tide)
limitation_text: Community centroid proxy, not official polygon boundary. StormGrid output is response priority, not outage probability. Modifier values are derived_proxy (seeded from community features), not measured GIS wind/rain/tide exposure.

Bedford.modifier_notes: Wind from tree+coastal proxies; Rain from lowland proxy; Tide from coastal proxy. Not measured GIS.
